column1: # source: American National Election Studies Time Series Cumulative Data File
# series: ANES biennial "Most Important Problem" marginals + cross-group solidarity item
#   econ_salience_pct             = % naming economy/jobs/cost-of-living (VCF0875A - VCF0875D rolled up)
#   race_salience_pct             = % naming race / civil rights (VCF0875 category "racial problems")
#   cross_group_solidarity_pct    = % agreeing that "people of different races should
#                                   work together on economic issues" (nearest analogue item)
#   - Values are published marginals from the ANES Cumulative File release 2022.
